rationale: Response is a generic commercial negotiation strategy. It discusses price escalation and SKU discontinuation terms, but nowhere references the persona's industry (electrical components distribution), geography (UK-only operations), regulatory baseline (UK GDPR, UK REACH, WEEE, etc.), or stakeholders (MD approval £100k, Head of Procurement, Sales Director). The answer could apply to any supplier renegotiation in any jurisdiction. No integration of the company context block.
specific_gaps: No reference to electrical components sub-sector when discussing SKU discontinuation risk
No mention of UK geography or jurisdiction-specific considerations
No regulatory context (e.g., UK REACH/WEEE supply continuity, Late Payment Act implications for payment terms)
No stakeholder awareness (MD escalation at £100k threshold, role of Head of Procurement)
Ignores open_notes about autumn channel partner programme launch
Does not reference recurring_matter 'supplier framework agreements' to ground the analysis
